en.title: Alenia Porter v5.9
en.formats_info:
🖼️ IMAGES:
.png, .jpg, .jpeg, .bmp, .tga, .webp

🎬 VIDEO:
.mp4, .mkv, .webm, .avi, .mov, .wmv, .flv, .m4v, .mpg, .mpeg, .m2v, .3gp, .3g2, .ts, .m2ts, .vob, .ogv, .asf, .divx

🎵 AUDIO:
.wav, .mp3, .flac, .m4a, .ogg, .opus, .aac, .wma, .aiff, .aif, .alac, .amr, .mid, .midi, .mp2, .mpga, .au, .snd, .ra, .rm

⚠️ NOTE: audiodefine and godot files are no longer generated as they corrupted destination projects in massive conversions.
en.update_available_desc: Version {} is available. Do you want to update now?
en.settings_theme_desc: Select a theme to change the application colors.
en.about_text: A media optimization tool created by Alenia Studios. If you like our work, consider supporting us.
en.format_warning: Select the format for each file
en.theme_mode_desc: Select light, dark, or inherit system settings.
